seoTitle: Coonawarra vs Cootra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Coonawarra and Cootra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coonawarra and Cootra.
heading: Coonawarra vs Cootra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coonawarra, South Australia and Cootra, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cootra has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Coonawarra (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coonawarra or Cootra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coonawarra has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Cootra scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coonawarra scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Cootra scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coonawarra or Cootra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cootra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
